summary: Defined the Write promotion origin contract: future cross-domain promotions must create destination-owned objects while preserving the original WritingNote as source context and retaining enough metadata to route back.
risks: This slice intentionally defines the origin contract only; persisted origin metadata and destination-specific promotion flows remain future implementation work.
recommended_next_reason: Stop before implementation slices; the next queued work should be added deliberately when choosing Add to Today or another destination flow.
